task.title: Fix owner-supervisor review timeout and worker release

events.content: Made review gating chunk-driven with timeout as backstop only: Made review gating chunk-driven with timeout as backstop only

raw.question: Made review gating chunk-driven with timeout as backstop only
raw.chosen: Made review gating chunk-driven with timeout as backstop only
raw.reasoning: Reviewer completion should follow streamed REVIEW_DECISION output, with trajectory as the durable record and timeout only for hangs

retrospective.summary: Made review gating completion-driven via streamed REVIEW_DECISION detection, added durable review trajectory events, and prevented double worker release on owner failure
